message.content:
@startuml
title フィールド選択シーケンス図

actor "ユーザ" as User
participant Manager
participant FieldModel
participant FieldSelectPresenter
participant FieldSelectView

User -> Manager : 
Manager --> FieldModel : (Child Component)
activate FieldModel
deactivate FieldModel
Manager ->> FieldSelectPresenter : Instantiate()
FieldSelectPresenter -->> FieldSelectView : (Child Component)
activate FieldSelectView
deactivate FieldSelectView
Manager ->> FieldSelectPresenter : Initialized()
FieldSelectPresenter <-x FieldModel : Fields\n<<field selection>>\n(Fields are retrieved from Model)\ndeactivate FieldModel
FieldSelectPresenter -x-> FieldSelectView : Initialized()\ndisplay fields to user for selection or random choice


opt [フィールド選択時] \n(Field Selection Time)
    note over User,FieldSelectView: ユーザーが特定のフィールドを選択する。\nThe user selects a specific field.\n(User action triggers OnSelectedField())
    
    activate FieldSelectView
    
    ' This arrow represents the UI event being sent back up through layers.
    FieldSelectView <-- FieldSelectPresenter : OnSelectedField()\n(field selected by user passed here via callback/event handler in Presenter layer.)
end opt



' Optional block 2 – Random button pressed scenario  
alt ランダムボタン押下時 / When “Random” Button Pressed  

note right of User:\nユーザーは「ランダム」を押す。The user presses ‘random’ instead of picking manually; this calls another method on presenter which internally picks randomly among available options then notifies view/model accordingly if needed etc.. 

   deactivate all participants except those involved below... 
    
     loop while not done yet? maybe retry logic inside itself too depending upon requirements but let's keep simple first pass without loops unless explicitly required later during refinement phase
